description: Two teams finish the season with identical win-loss records. A league administrator must apply the official tie-breaking procedure to determine their final ranking.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two teams that are tied in the standings.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the two teams have identical records.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the official league tie-breaking rules from the rulebook.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the first tie-breaker is 'head-to-head record'.

nodes.task_description: Apply the first tie-breaker by checking the head-to-head results between the two teams.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that Team A won the season series against Team B.

nodes.task_description: Update the final standings, placing Team A ahead of Team B.

expected_outcome.value: Agent publishes the final, correct standings.
